# ZD Tech

> ZD Tech is an independent creative studio publishing browser games, Roblox games, Sui/Web3 DApps, creative tools, and bilingual (zh/en) AI news updates.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.etboodonline.com/

## Main Sections

- Home: https://www.etboodonline.com/
- Projects: https://www.etboodonline.com/project
- News (daily AI hot topics): https://www.etboodonline.com/news
- Blog (tutorials & novels): https://www.etboodonline.com/blog
- What We Do: https://www.etboodonline.com/what-we-do
- Service: https://www.etboodonline.com/service
- Contact: https://www.etboodonline.com/contact

## Web Games

- Lobster Run: https://www.etboodonline.com/h5game01/%E9%BE%99%E8%99%BE%E8%B7%91%E9%85%B7.html — a fun lobster parkour H5 game, run jump and dodge obstacles
- Mini Soccer: https://www.etboodonline.com/football/football-game.html — line-draw soccer game with elastic shots, curve aim and score with precise rebounds
- Assassin: https://www.etboodonline.com/killerh5/ — analyze scenes, identify targets, use props wisely and become a legendary assassin
- Swim Race: https://www.etboodonline.com/swim/ — 100m freestyle swimming race, sprint dash collect power-ups and win
- Skyfall Zombie Siege: https://www.etboodonline.com/zombiesiege/shotdemo01.html — survive the apocalypse, defend your base, upgrade weapons and fight endless zombie hordes
- Grandpa's Desert Farm: https://www.etboodonline.com/saveman/saveman.html — build up Grandpa's desert farm, plant crops and turn sand into a thriving oasis
- Hot Dance Crew: https://www.etboodonline.com/hotdance/hotdance.html — stage-based rhythm web game with falling arrows, combos and a top-10 leaderboard
- Drop a Friend: https://www.etboodonline.com/dropafriend/dropafriend.html — drag friends to the cliff edge, push them through traps and collect coins
- Blade Dart: https://www.etboodonline.com/bladedart/bladedart.html — throw darts at a rotating target, unlock blades, upgrade damage and conquer 300 levels
- Summit Seeker: https://www.etboodonline.com/summit/summit.html — scale the icy peak step by step, survive rocks and predators in this minimalist arcade challenge
- Crazy Bird: https://www.etboodonline.com/crazybird/ — slingshot your bird to knock down pigs and bust through block fortresses (Sui testnet)

## AI Daily News

Daily AI news briefings across models, products, industry trends, and research. Updated every day with 10 curated items.
- https://www.etboodonline.com/news
